text: Welcome aboard, newbie_kim! You are in as a member—feel free to explore, ask questions, and get involved.
Welcome aboard as an event helper, guide_sam! Thanks for stepping up to support our community events.
Welcome aboard as a mentor, mentor_lina! We appreciate you sharing your experience and supporting newer members.
Welcome aboard as a moderator, helper_alex! We are excited to have you help keep the community running smoothly.
